title: Could the Dummy Plug beat Zeruel
display_title: Could the Dummy Plug beat Zeruel
wikitext:
[]: Could the Dummy Plug beat Zeruel?             Quote Post by quixote77 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:12 am I'm just wondering...if they had managed to get it to work, could a Dummy Plug controlled Unit 01 beat the Angel of Might?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:09 am ...Probably? (Just for the record: You've made way too many new threads in a short time period. Settle down!)

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:31 am Hmm...well I think that would depend purely where Nerv would deploy the Eva; Eva-00 simply charged behind Zeruel's back with an N2 mine. If Eva-01's DP did work, (I'd) run up and drop-kick her. Considering the DP isn't exactly Eva-01 acting of its own accord (like having the ability to shred up the Angel's toilet paper with ease), I'm thinking the DP Eva-01 would actually have a bit of competition. Hey, if the DP knew how to get the Angel on the ground and rip her face off, then it's a clear win!

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:51 am i say YES and NO! why!? well, even Shinji would have beaten Zeruel if his power hadn't quit, only where the batterie was empty Berserk-01 had to finish the job, i think the dummy plug would've had the same problem, so that Berserk-01 would've finished the job just like he did when Shinji was fighting. so NO, but on the other hand, when there wasn't the limitation of battery power and the Dummy plug is pretty similar to the Berserk state i think it would take a bit longer but with the same ending as if Berserk-01 would've done it, so YES, you agree?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 17, 2009 9:43 am I don't think Zeruel was particularly all that injured until Yui pulled out the blade-like ATF. Sure Shinji was throwing Zer a curb-party but it's not clear that he particularly did anything other than force it to move around a bit. I'm gonna call that a no.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jul 17, 2009 12:47 pm dummy berserk doesnt have the same at filed control as notmal berserk/pissed off Shinji so i dont think it would work. if you've seen 2.0... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Hotaru » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:10 pm Speaking of which, when they went against Arael, why didn't they use the dummy plug? There would be no mind to contaminate so its main attack would be ineffective, right?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:18 pm Considering the Dummy Plug system amounts to making EVA-01 go RRRAAAAUGH and absolutely destroy its most immediate target in a sloppy non-strategic way, and that's basically what EVA-01 does to defeat Zeruel in the canon events , I'd say yes. Hotaru wrote: Speaking of which, when they went against Arael, why didn't they use the dummy plug? There would be no mind to contaminate so its main attack would be ineffective, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:20 pm I see why not since the Eva would be bloodlust which means it will go out of control and destroying anything it in path. If it was used on 00 or 02 then they might beat him with some serious issues, but if it was used on 01 then he will win in a ease.

[]:             Quote Post by Hotaru » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:25 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Arael was a precision-based mission. Not exactly the Dummy Plug's expertise.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:32 pm How would that even work out, anyway? Would it just sort of frustratedly growl and stomp buildings after realizing it didn't know how to use a gun?

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:40 pm Well considering the Dummy Plug completely annihilated Bardiel, I would say yes, it could have beaten Zereul. Hotaru wrote: Speaking of which, when they went against Arael, why didn't they use the dummy plug? There would be no mind to contaminate so its main attack would be ineffective, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:49 pm Based on the original series: The dummy plug was very efficient in killing bardiel, even as far as to go over kill on the plug itself. I think its very possible it could have given Zeruel a good fight and has a chance of winning. Yui was extremely powerful though so it is hard to say just how big a chance.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Jul 19, 2009 4:07 pm It depends on whether or not Eva-01 could have beaten it without the offensive ATF?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 19, 2009 5:55 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Considering the Dummy Plug system amounts to making EVA-01 go RRRAAAAUGH and absolutely destroy its most immediate target in a sloppy non-strategic way, and that's basically what EVA-01 does to defeat Zeruel in the canon events , I'd say yes.

[]:             Quote Post by superfreak110 » Sun Nov 29, 2009 10:33 am YES

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:07 pm superfreak110's one-word bump of this nearly 5-month old thread wrote: YES

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:59 pm Would be an interesting battle, Dummy Plug vs Ver. seeing as how it worked ageist 03.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:35 pm It depends on the needs of the narrative. Much like the question, "Could Wolverine grow back a severed hand?" or "Could they bring [insert autobot/decepticon here] back from the dead?".

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:54 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It depends on the needs of the narrative. Much like the question, "Could Wolverine grow back a severed hand?" or "Could they bring [insert autobot/decepticon here] back from the dead?".
